NEWS April 2026 Monthly Report See here for what I've been up to in Hackney and Westminster in March. 2 days ago Work with Meg Job Title: Constituency Support Officer (4 days a week) Working For: Meg Hillier MP (Hackney South and Shoreditch) Location: Westminster, London Salary: In line with IPSA pay scales. Pro rata 4 days a week. Meg Hillier MP is seeking a Constituency Support Officer to join her Westminster office. The successful candidate will support Meg and her team primarily by responding to enquiries from constituents.
